---
title: "About"
format: html
editor: visual
---

This project was developed by **Zachary Zhicheng Xu** For [INFO 526 - Data Analysis and Visualization](https://datavizaz.org/) at the University of Arizona, taught by Dr. Greg Chism. The team is comprised of the following team members.

- Team member 1: Zachary Zhicheng Xu 2026 M.S. Data Science
